items.name: cherry-studio
items.description: AI productivity studio with smart chat, autonomous agents, and 300+ assistants. Unified access to frontier LLMs

license.name: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0

items.name: notebooklm-py
items.description: Unofficial Python API and agentic skill for Google NotebookLM. Full programmatic access to NotebookLM's features—including capabilities the web UI doesn't expose—via Python, CLI, and AI agents like Claude Code, Codex, and OpenClaw.

items.name: cli
items.description: The official Lark/Feishu CLI tool, maintained by the larksuite team — built for humans and AI Agents. Covers core business domains including Messenger, Docs, Base, Sheets, Calendar, Mail, Tasks, Meetings, and more, with 200+ commands and 20+ AI Agent Skills.

items.name: OpenViking
items.description: OpenViking is an open-source context database designed specifically for AI Agents(such as openclaw). OpenViking unifies the management of context (memory, resources, and skills) that Agents need through a file system paradigm, enabling hierarchical context delivery and self-evolving.

license.name: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0

items.name: nexent
items.description: Nexent is a zero-code platform for auto-generating production-grade AI agents using Harness Engineering principles — unified tools, skills, memory, and orchestration with built-in constraints, feedback loops, and control planes.

items.name: OpenAgentd
items.description: Self-hosted AI agent OS — streaming chat, tool use, persistent memory, and multi-agent teams. Runs entirely on your machine.

items.name: tubecli
items.description: ⚡ TubeCLI — The Ultimate Open Source AI Agents Ecosystem | Agents Browser · Agents Workflow · Agents Studio World

items.name: OpenShell
items.description: OpenShell is the safe, private runtime for autonomous AI agents.

items.name: MASFactory
items.description: A Graph-Centric Framework for Orchestrating Multi-Agent Systems with Vibe Graphing.

items.name: OpenCLI
items.description: Make Any Website & Tool Your CLI. A universal CLI Hub and AI-native runtime. Transform any website, Electron app, or local binary into a standardized command-line interface. Built for AI Agents to discover, learn, and execute tools seamlessly via a unified AGENT.md integration.
